title: CIRCE End Strategy Schema
description: Cohort end date strategies for CIRCE cohort expressions. Defines DateOffset and CustomEra strategies that determine when cohort episodes end.

DateOffsetStrategy.description: Date offset end strategy. Defines cohort end as a fixed offset from a date field. Serialized in JSON as: {"DateOffset": {...}}

CustomEraStrategy.description: Custom era end strategy. Defines cohort end based on drug era persistence. Serialized in JSON as: {"CustomEra": {...}}
